title: Esportswala Elite Invitational Battle/Season 2
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Esportswala Elite Invitational Battle Season 2}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=Esportswala Elite Invitational Battle Season 2 |icon= |tickername=EEIB:S2 |shortname=EEIB:S2 |image=EsportsWala Elite Inviational Season2.PNG |type=Online |team_number=24 |series=Esportswala Elite Invitational Battle |organizer=EsportsWala |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/esports.wala/?utm_medium=copy_link/ |sponsor=[https://www.loco.gg/ Loco] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=1,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-09-06 |edate=2021-09-16 |twitter=Esportswala |instagram=esports.wala |web= |discord=7zGDQdHwHs |loco=streamers/FLSRUJBLSN |facebook= |youtube=channel/UCO8Jcx5F0qj3D4ZBVjMAnQA }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/esports.wala/?utm_medium=copy_link/ EsportsWala]''' in association with [https://www.loco.gg/ Loco] present the second iteration of the BGMI tournament ''Esportswala Elite Invitational Battle'' called the '''''Esportswala Elite Invitational Battle Season 2''''' with a prize pool of ₹1,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Prince|b1name=Prince Chaudhary |b1flag=in|b1link=Prince (Caster) |b2=Samop|b2name=Nitesh Batra|b2flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Esportswala Elite Invitational Battle Season 2:''' 6th September 2021 to 10th September 2021.'' * ''24 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]], and [[Sanhok]]'' * ''11 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days.'' ====Matchdays==== * ''4 Matchdays: 2 Matches on Day-2, and 3 Matches for the rest of the days.'' ** '''''6th September''''': ''(E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''7th September''''': ''(E>>M)'' ** '''''15th September''''': ''(E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''16th September''''': ''(E>>M>>S)'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" !
